meta.name: indic-prosody-tn-testset
meta.description: Hand-authored labeled test set for code-mixed (Hindi/English) Text Normalization. Gold = spoken-form string a TTS acoustic model should pronounce. Conventions: acronyms -> hyphen-joined phonetic letter names (PNR->pee-en-aar); identifier/OTP/phone digits -> read digit-by-digit; true quantities -> cardinals in the local language; Hindi carrier words preserved verbatim (romanized or Devanagari); times/dates/currency/units/percent/ordinals expanded.
meta.label_policy: gold normalization authored by a human; G2P gold is produced separately via espeak-ng reference (see g2p module).

samples.text: Mera flight ticket PNR-8392 hai, aur departure 4:30 PM ko hai.
samples.gold: Mera flight ticket pee-en-aar eight three nine two hai, aur departure four thirty pee-em ko hai.

samples.text: IRCTC se ticket book karo, fare Rs 1250 hai.
samples.gold: aai-aar-see-tee-see se ticket book karo, fare one thousand two hundred fifty rupees hai.

samples.text: Mera OTP 4521 hai aur account number 99887766 hai.
samples.gold: Mera oh-tee-pee four five two one hai aur account number nine nine eight eight seven seven six six hai.

samples.text: Meeting 9:05 AM par hai, 3rd floor conference room mein.
samples.gold: Meeting nine oh five ay-em par hai, third floor conference room mein.

samples.text: COVID-19 ke baad temperature 37.5 degree tak gaya.
samples.gold: kovid nineteen ke baad temperature thirty seven point five degree tak gaya.

samples.text: Is ghar ki keemat Rs 45 lakh hai.
samples.gold: Is ghar ki keemat forty five lakh rupees hai.

samples.text: Company ne ₹2.5 crore ka profit kamaaya.
samples.gold: Company ne two point five crore rupees ka profit kamaaya.

samples.text: Mujhe 98765-43210 par call karo.
samples.gold: Mujhe nine eight seven six five four three two one zero par call karo.

samples.text: Exam mein usne 92% marks scored kiye.
samples.gold: Exam mein usne ninety two percent marks scored kiye.

samples.text: Meri appointment 15/08/2024 ko hai.
samples.gold: Meri appointment fifteenth August twenty twenty four ko hai.

samples.text: India 1947 mein azaad hua tha.
samples.gold: India nineteen forty seven mein azaad hua tha.

samples.text: Office ghar se 12.5 km door hai.
samples.gold: Office ghar se twelve point five kilometre door hai.

samples.text: Mujhe 2 kg aaloo aur 500 g pyaaz chahiye.
samples.gold: Mujhe two kilogram aaloo aur five hundred gram pyaaz chahiye.

samples.text: Delivery 10-15 din mein ho jaayegi.
samples.gold: Delivery ten to fifteen din mein ho jaayegi.

samples.text: Train 18:30 baje platform 4 se chalegi.
samples.gold: Train eighteen thirty baje platform four se chalegi.

samples.text: Recipe mein 1/2 cup sugar daalo.
samples.gold: Recipe mein half cup sugar daalo.

samples.text: RBI ne repo rate 6.5% rakha hai.
samples.gold: aar-bee-aai ne repo rate six point five percent rakha hai.

samples.text: Payment UPI se karo, amount Rs 350 hai.
samples.gold: Payment yoo-pee-aai se karo, amount three hundred fifty rupees hai.

samples.text: मेरी सैलरी 50000 रुपये प्रति माह है।
samples.gold: मेरी सैलरी fifty thousand रुपये प्रति माह है।

samples.text: Maine naya iPhone 15 Pro Max liya hai.
samples.gold: Maine naya iPhone fifteen Pro Max liya hai.

samples.text: Match mein India ne 287/4 banaaye.
samples.gold: Match mein India ne two hundred eighty seven for four banaaye.

samples.text: Shimla mein aaj -3 degree Celsius hai.
samples.gold: Shimla mein aaj minus three degree Celsius hai.

samples.text: Aaj ki GK class mein PM aur CM dono aaye.
samples.gold: Aaj ki jee-kay class mein pee-em aur see-em dono aaye.

samples.text: Mere phone mein 128 GB storage aur 8 GB RAM hai.
samples.gold: Mere phone mein one hundred twenty eight gigabyte storage aur eight gigabyte ram hai.

samples.text: Flight AI-302 ka boarding gate B7 hai.
samples.gold: Flight ay-aai three zero two ka boarding gate bee seven hai.

samples.text: Uska 21st birthday next week hai.
samples.gold: Uska twenty first birthday next week hai.

samples.text: Hum log 2:30 baje milenge cafe par.
samples.gold: Hum log two thirty baje milenge cafe par.

samples.text: Iska price Rs 99.50 hai bas.
samples.gold: Iska price ninety nine rupees fifty paise hai bas.

samples.text: GST aur PAN card ke bina registration nahi hoga.
samples.gold: jee-es-tee aur pan card ke bina registration nahi hoga.

samples.text: Stadium mein 1,25,000 log aaye the.
samples.gold: Stadium mein one lakh twenty five thousand log aaye the.

samples.text: Agar 5 + 3 = 8 hota hai toh answer simple hai.
samples.gold: Agar five plus three equals eight hota hai toh answer simple hai.

samples.text: Naya Android 14 update aa gaya hai.
samples.gold: Naya Android fourteen update aa gaya hai.

samples.text: Subah 6 baje uthna padega kal.
samples.gold: Subah six baje uthna padega kal.

samples.text: Mera pincode 700032 hai, Kolkata ka.
samples.gold: Mera pincode seven zero zero zero three two hai, Kolkata ka.

samples.text: Loan ka interest 8.75% per annum hai.
samples.gold: Loan ka interest eight point seven five percent per annum hai.

samples.text: Mera CPU aur GPU dono overheat ho rahe hain.
samples.gold: Mera see-pee-yoo aur jee-pee-yoo dono overheat ho rahe hain.

samples.text: Gaadi 80 km/h ki speed par thi.
samples.gold: Gaadi eighty kilometre per hour ki speed par thi.

samples.text: Diwali is saal 1st November ko hai.
samples.gold: Diwali is saal first November ko hai.

samples.text: Order ID #ORD2024X ready hai pickup ke liye.
samples.gold: Order aai-dee oh-aar-dee two zero two four eks ready hai pickup ke liye.

samples.text: 10 logon ke liye Rs 2000 ka bill 12:45 PM par aaya.
samples.gold: ten logon ke liye two thousand rupees ka bill twelve forty five pee-em par aaya.
